hero.title: About ChoicePie
hero.desc: We believe knowledge sharing shouldn't be a cold, one-way lecture. ChoicePie turns every tech talk into a game.

mission.label: MISSION
mission.text: Make the last 5 minutes of every tech talk the most exciting moment of the room.

story.title: Why ChoicePie?
story.p1: Have you ever attended a tech talk where the speaker spent 45 minutes sharing great content, only to end with "Any questions?" — followed by three seconds of silence and everyone leaving?
story.p2: That knowledge probably stayed on the slides, never truly absorbed.
story.p3: ChoicePie was born from this pain point. We bring the "Testing Effect" from academic research into tech communities — converting content into questions improves retention by 50% compared to re-reading.
story.p4: More importantly, competitive Q&A adds excitement, turning those 5 minutes into the most engaging moment of the event.

fast.title: Fast
fast.desc: Generate questions in 30 seconds, set up in 2 minutes — no prep needed.

fun.title: Fun
fun.desc: Timed answers and live rankings make learning feel like a competition.

effective.title: Effective
effective.desc: The Testing Effect ensures knowledge truly sticks, not just sitting on slides.

cta.title: Ready to try it?
cta.subtitle: Give it a shot at your next tech talk

howToUse.title: How to Use ChoicePie
howToUse.subtitle: From questions to answers in under 5 minutes

hostSteps.title: Paste Your Content
hostSteps.desc: Paste your tech article, notes, or YouTube link. Supports plain text and URLs, up to 5,000 characters.

hostSteps.title: AI Generates Questions
hostSteps.desc: Choose question count (3 / 5 / 10) and difficulty. AI generates multiple-choice questions in 30 seconds. Preview and edit freely.

hostSteps.title: Create a Game Room
hostSteps.desc: Confirm questions and click 'Create Room'. A 6-digit room code and QR Code are instantly generated — project them for players to scan.

hostSteps.title: Start the Game
hostSteps.desc: Once players join, click 'Start Game'. Monitor live answer progress and skip or pause questions as needed.

playerSteps.title: Scan QR Code
playerSteps.desc: Scan the QR Code projected by the host, or go to choicepie.app/join and enter the 6-digit room code.

playerSteps.title: Enter Nickname
playerSteps.desc: Enter a 2–12 character nickname — no account needed. You'll see the waiting screen and other players after joining.

playerSteps.title: Answer Fast
playerSteps.desc: You have 20 seconds per question. The faster you answer correctly, the more points you earn. See the answer and your rank after each question.

playerSteps.title: Final Rankings
playerSteps.desc: After all questions, the full leaderboard is revealed with your total score and rank.

scoring.title: ⚡ Scoring System
scoring.footer: Wrong answers earn 0 pts · 20 seconds per question

items.a: No. Players only need a nickname to join — no registration required. Only the Host needs to sign in to create a game.

items.q: How many players can join a room?
items.a: The current MVP supports up to 30 simultaneous players, enough for most tech talks. The limit will increase in future versions.

items.q: How good is the AI-generated content?
items.a: The AI generates questions highly relevant to your content, with knowledge explanations included. You can preview and edit every question before creating the room.

items.q: How long is a room code valid?
items.a: A room is valid for 24 hours after creation. After the game ends it becomes read-only (questions and rankings visible), then clears after 48 hours.

items.q: Can I reuse the same quiz?
items.a: Yes. Hosts can find previously created quizzes in their history and reopen a room with them.

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.body: By using ChoicePie, you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use the service.

accounts.title: 2. Accounts
accounts.body: Creating a game requires an account; joining a game does not. You are responsible for keeping your login credentials secure and for all activity under your account.

content.title: 3. User Content
content.body: Quizzes you upload or create (including AI-generated questions) remain yours, but you grant ChoicePie a license to store, process, and display that content in order to provide the service.

conduct.title: 4. Acceptable Use
conduct.body: Do not use the service to post illegal, infringing, harassing, or malicious content. ChoicePie reserves the right to remove violating content or terminate accounts.

termination.title: 5. Termination
termination.body: We may suspend or terminate your account for violating these terms. You may also stop using the service at any time.

disclaimer.title: 6. Disclaimer
disclaimer.body: The service is currently in MVP development and is provided "as is" without guarantee of uninterrupted or error-free operation. We do not guarantee the accuracy of AI-generated content.

changes.title: 7. Changes to These Terms
changes.body: We may update these terms from time to time; material changes will be announced on the site. Continued use of the service constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

contact.title: 8. Contact Us
contact.body: If you have any questions about these terms, please reach out to us via the About page.

collection.title: 1. What We Collect
collection.body: When you register, we collect your name and email (or basic profile info via Google sign-in). Players joining a game only need a nickname and do not need to register.

usage.title: 2. How We Use Your Data
usage.body: We use this data to provide account login, store the quizzes you create, and operate game rooms. We do not use your data for purposes unrelated to the service.

sharing.title: 3. Data Sharing
sharing.body: We do not sell your personal data. We only share necessary information with third parties when required by law or necessary to provide the service (e.g. authentication providers).

cookies.title: 4. Cookies & Tracking
cookies.body: We use essential cookies to maintain login sessions and game room connections. We do not use them for cross-site advertising tracking.

retention.title: 5. Data Retention
retention.body: Your account data is retained until you delete your account. Temporary game room data (such as answer history) is cleared some time after the game ends.

rights.title: 6. Your Rights
rights.body: You may request to view, correct, or delete your personal data at any time by contacting us via the About page.

changes.title: 7. Changes to This Policy
changes.body: We may update this policy from time to time; material changes will be announced on the site.

contact.title: 8. Contact Us
contact.body: If you have any questions about this policy, please reach out to us via the About page.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.desc: The page you're looking for may have moved or doesn't exist. Head back home and see what's cooking!

generic.title: Something Went Wrong
generic.desc: We hit a snag on our end. Please try again in a moment.
